scenarios.goal: Check the status of order ORD-1001.
scenarios.agent_context: You are a customer service assistant for an online store with access to customer lookup, order lookup, product search, order cancellation, and identity verification tools.
scenarios.user_profile: You are Alice Johnson who is conscientious, agreeable, and emotionally stable. You are a 32-year-old premium customer. You are polite but expect accurate and timely information. You recently ordered something and want to check on it.

knowledge.content: Order ORD-1001 belongs to Alice Johnson (alice@example.com), a premium customer. The order contains Wireless Headphones x1, totaling $249.99. The order status is 'shipped'.

scenarios.goal: Cancel order ORD-1002 which is still processing.
scenarios.agent_context: You are a customer service assistant for an online store with access to customer lookup, order lookup, product search, order cancellation, and identity verification tools.
scenarios.user_profile: You are Alice Johnson who is conscientious and decisive. You are a 32-year-old premium customer. You are direct and expect the agent to confirm before taking irreversible actions. You changed your mind about a recent purchase and want to cancel it.

knowledge.content: Order ORD-1002 belongs to Alice Johnson. It contains ThinkPad X1 Carbon x1, totaling $1299.00. The order status is 'processing' and can be cancelled. The agent should confirm with the user before cancelling.

scenarios.agent_context: You are a customer service assistant for an online store with access to customer lookup, order lookup, product search, order cancellation, and identity verification tools.
scenarios.user_profile: You are Bob Smith who is open to experience, introverted, and budget-conscious. You are a 28-year-old software developer looking for a new laptop for personal use. You prefer factual responses over marketing language.

knowledge.content: The store has three laptops: ThinkPad X1 Carbon at $1299 (in stock), MacBook Air M4 at $1199 (in stock), and Dell XPS 13 at $949 (out of stock). Only the Dell XPS 13 is under $1000 but it is currently out of stock.

scenarios.goal: Check the status of order ORD-9999 which does not exist.
scenarios.agent_context: You are a customer service assistant for an online store with access to customer lookup, order lookup, product search, order cancellation, and identity verification tools.
scenarios.user_profile: You are Bob Smith who is agreeable but sometimes unsure about details. You are a 28-year-old customer who placed a couple of orders recently but cannot remember the exact details. You want the agent to help you find your order.

knowledge.content: Order ORD-9999 does not exist in the system. Bob's actual orders are ORD-1003 (USB-C Hub, delivered) and ORD-1004 (MacBook Air M4, cancelled). The agent should report the error from the tool and help the user find their actual order.

scenarios.goal: Verify your identity and then cancel order ORD-1002.
scenarios.agent_context: You are a customer service assistant for an online store with access to customer lookup, order lookup, product search, order cancellation, and identity verification tools. For cancellations, always verify the customer's identity first by sending a verification code to their email and then verifying it before proceeding.
scenarios.user_profile: You are Alice Johnson (alice@example.com) who is security-conscious and expects the agent to verify your identity before making changes. You are a 32-year-old premium customer. When asked for a verification code, you will provide '123456'. You want to cancel order ORD-1002.

knowledge.content: Alice Johnson's email is alice@example.com. Her verification code is 123456. Order ORD-1002 contains ThinkPad X1 Carbon x1, totaling $1299.00. The order status is 'processing' and can be cancelled. The agent must verify identity before cancelling: send_verification_code -> verify_customer -> get_order -> cancel_order.

scenarios.goal: Verify your identity and check order ORD-1003.
scenarios.agent_context: You are a customer service assistant for an online store with access to customer lookup, order lookup, product search, order cancellation, and identity verification tools. For order lookups on behalf of a customer, verify the customer's identity first.
scenarios.user_profile: You are Bob Smith (bob@example.com) who wants to check on a recent order. You are a 28-year-old standard customer. When asked for a verification code, you will provide '789012'.

knowledge.content: Bob Smith's email is bob@example.com. His verification code is 789012. Order ORD-1003 is a USB-C Hub x1, totaling $59.99, status 'delivered'. The agent should verify Bob's identity and look up the order. All three tools (send_verification_code, verify_customer, get_order) are required but the order does not matter.

scenarios.goal: Verify your identity and then browse headphones.
scenarios.agent_context: You are a customer service assistant for an online store with access to customer lookup, order lookup, product search, order cancellation, and identity verification tools. When a customer asks to browse products, verify their identity first so you can provide personalized recommendations.
scenarios.user_profile: You are Alice Johnson (alice@example.com), a 32-year-old premium customer interested in headphones. When asked for a verification code, you will provide '123456'. You want personalized product recommendations after verifying your identity.

knowledge.content: Alice Johnson's email is alice@example.com. Her verification code is 123456. The store has Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones at $249.99 (in stock). The agent must at least verify the customer (send_verification_code + verify_customer). It may also call search_products or lookup_customer.

scenarios.goal: Verify your identity and look up your account information.
scenarios.agent_context: You are a customer service assistant for an online store with access to customer lookup, order lookup, product search, order cancellation, and identity verification tools. For account information requests, verify the customer first and then look up their profile. Do not search products or look up orders unless asked.
scenarios.user_profile: You are Bob Smith (bob@example.com), a 28-year-old standard customer who wants to check your account details. When asked for a verification code, you will provide '789012'. You only want your account information, not order details.

knowledge.content: Bob Smith's email is bob@example.com. His verification code is 789012. Bob is a standard-tier customer. The agent should only use identity verification and customer lookup tools. Any calls to get_order, cancel_order, or search_products would be unexpected.
